meaning: Reprojection error scoring threshold computation.
Fraction of cameras that aligned.
Camera position error as ratio of GSD — scale-independent quality measure.

formula_expression: check reportParams_optimization_parameters contains {f, b1, b2, cx, cy, k1, k2, k3, p1, p2}
meaning: How complete is the BA optimization parameter set?
Did precalibration expectation match actual loading?
Camera model consistency between declaration and report.

formula_expression: IF reportCameras_precalibrated=No AND abs(reportCalibration_k1_k2_correlation) > 0.95 AND (reportSurveyData_reprojection_error_pix > 2 OR reportGCP_check_rmse_total_cm > 2*manifest_accuracy_target_m * 100) THEN flag
meaning: Compound condition: ill-conditioned self-calibration only flagged when co-occurring with degraded reprojection or CP residuals (per v0.2 reviewer fix).
Ratio of max to RMS reprojection error — outlier detection.

formula_expression: reportParams_alignment_accuracy mapped to {High, Medium, Low} classes
meaning: Class membership of alignment accuracy setting.

formula_expression: reportParams_depth_quality mapped to {High, Medium, Low} classes
meaning: Class membership of depth map quality setting.
Tie point density.
Direct read; threshold-banded.
Filtering mode appropriateness for declared site type.

formula_expression: reportGCP_per_marker_image_count — per-marker count of images marker appears in
meaning: For per-marker triangulation strength scoring.

formula_expression: v1: IF tiepoint_density_per_km2 < 1M OR DEM has visible voids in reportDEM_void_statistics THEN partial-flag. v2: full density-map parse.
meaning: V1 partial detection via global proxies; full detection deferred to v2 visual analysis.

formula_expression: IF reprojection > 2 AND tie_density < 1M/km² AND camera_pos_xy > 15 cm THEN flag
meaning: Composite advisory cross-handoff to drone chain.
CP RMSE as multiple of accuracy target — primary moment-of-truth measure.
GCP RMSE as multiple of accuracy target.

formula_expression: per-CP: reportGCP_per_marker_residuals (filtered to CPs) / mean(CP residuals)
meaning: Per-CP residual as multiple of ensemble mean.
Per-marker role consistency between manifest declaration and Agisoft report.

formula_expression: reportGCP_marker_locations (control points) vs pp_gcp_coord_file_gcp_positions per-GCP comparison within noise tolerance
meaning: Per-GCP coordinate consistency between Agisoft report and pre_processing GCP coord file.

formula_expression: spatial coverage fraction of reportGCP_marker_locations (control points) over site extent
meaning: How well GCPs in bundle cover the survey extent.
GCP vertical spread relative to terrain vertical range.
Vertical vs horizontal residual ratio.
Per-marker image pixel residual as multiple of ensemble mean.

formula_expression: IF gcp_count >= 3 AND gcp_rmse_relative_to_target <= 1 AND cp_rmse_relative_to_target > 2 THEN composite-flag
meaning: Diagnostic composite: adequate control + good GCP residuals + bad CP residuals = terrain/coverage/atmospheric issue.
No markers at all (CATASTROPHIC flag-only).
No control points used in bundle (CRITICAL flag-only).
Output CRS match with project requirement.

formula_expression: parse EPSG of reportParams_coordinate_system, classify geographic vs projected
meaning: Whether output CRS is projected (suitable for survey measurements).
Internal georeferencing transform consistency with capture frame.

formula_expression: IF manifest_dtm_deliverable_claimed=True AND reportDEM_ground_classification_ran=False THEN flag
meaning: DTM claimed but ground classification not run = DSM-labelled-as-DTM.

formula_expression: parse reportDEM_void_statistics for void/hole interpolation fraction
meaning: Fraction of DEM area filled by interpolation across data voids (version-dependent field).
DEM resolution as multiple of image GSD.

formula_expression: For each in manifest_declared_deliverables: check corresponding deliverable_*_present.
meaning: Per-deliverable presence check.

formula_expression: v1: reportSystem_software_version vs manifest_software_version_baseline. v2: vs CBMI-maintained known-good/buggy list.
meaning: Software version classification (v1: declared baseline match; v2: known-buggy list maintained).
Direct read for verification_status determination.
